title: lanthorus macrostachys
intro: Lanthorus macrostachys, also known as the "Coral Root," is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. Traditionally, the root of this plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat a variety of health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lanthorus macrostachys are said to include the ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system, making it a sought-after remedy for colds and flu. Lanthorus macrostachys is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be dried and used in herbal infusions or as a powder for added convenience.
